Core product page

# Bring FIRE planning, asset management, and tracking into one app

This page is not just a calculator reference. It explains how Fire Path turns calculation, comparison, asset tracking, and long-term planning into one connected product.

If you arrived here from search, articles, or backlinks, the goal is to help you understand why Fire Path is worth downloading, not to keep you in abstract reading mode.

[Download the app](https://www.fire-path.app/download?source=toolpage_primary&cta=download_app) [Read the methodology](https://www.fire-path.app/methodology)

![](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fmockup.png&w=3840&q=75)

![Fire Path product page preview](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fen%2F01.png&w=3840&q=75)

## Three things this page should make clear

- • Fire Path is not just a FIRE calculator. It is a planning and tracking app.
- • After v1.3.0, the product includes asset management, multi-currency overview, dashboard tracking, saved scenarios, and allocation settings.
- • The website explains the value clearly, but the real product experience happens inside the app.

## Why this page matters

This is the most important product landing page on the site. It should convert high-intent search, article, homepage, and backlink traffic into a clear product understanding and then into app downloads.

Full Product Walkthrough

## The 7 product moments that matter most

These sections mirror the App Store storyline, but expand each screenshot into a clearer product explanation for search, AI summaries, and conversion.

FIRE planning6 modestimeline

Key point 1

### Know Your FIRE Date

Calculate your FIRE target, years to FI, and FIRE age with six planning modes instead of relying on a single rough estimate.

Turn retirement ideas into a clear planning target.

[See the related feature page](https://www.fire-path.app/features/fire-comparison)

![](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fmockup.png&w=3840&q=75)

![Fire Path FIRE date calculation screen](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fen%2F01.png&w=3840&q=75)

ComparisonScenario planningDecision making

Key point 2

### Compare FIRE Paths

See how different assumptions, contribution levels, and FIRE modes change the timeline before you commit to one strategy.

Make trade-offs visible before they become costly decisions.

[See the related feature page](https://www.fire-path.app/features/fire-comparison)

![](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fmockup.png&w=3840&q=75)

![Fire Path comparison mode screen](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fen%2F02.png&w=3840&q=75)

DashboardProgress trackingMilestones

Key point 3

### Track FIRE Progress

The home dashboard brings together current assets, FIRE target, and progress so your plan stays visible over time.

Move from one-time calculation to ongoing tracking.

[See the related feature page](https://www.fire-path.app/features/fire-dashboard)

![](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fmockup.png&w=3840&q=75)

![Fire Path dashboard screen](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fen%2F03.png&w=3840&q=75)

Asset managementMulti-currencyOverview

Key point 4

### See Every Asset

Organize tracked assets, allocation, and total holdings in one place with a unified display currency for a clearer asset picture.

Connect asset management directly to FIRE planning.

[See the related feature page](https://www.fire-path.app/features/asset-management)

![](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fmockup.png&w=3840&q=75)

![Fire Path asset management screen](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fen%2F04.png&w=3840&q=75)

HistoryScenario archiveIteration

Key point 5

### Save Scenarios

Keep each calculation you run so you can revisit assumptions, compare versions, and refine your plan instead of starting over.

Build a planning history, not just a single result.

[See the related feature page](https://www.fire-path.app/features/calculation-history)

![](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fmockup.png&w=3840&q=75)

![Fire Path calculation history screen](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fen%2F05.png&w=3840&q=75)

AllocationReal-world planningCalibration

Key point 6

### Tune Your Plan

Allocation settings let you shape projections around how you actually deploy capital, not just around abstract average returns.

Make forecasts more realistic and actionable.

[See the related feature page](https://www.fire-path.app/features/asset-management)

![](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fmockup.png&w=3840&q=75)

![Fire Path allocation planning screen](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fen%2F06.png&w=3840&q=75)

Daily tasksRetentionHabits

Key point 7

### Build the Habit

Daily tasks, streaks, and points give users a reason to return, update their plan, and stay engaged with long-term progress.

Support repeat usage instead of one-time app installs.

[See the related feature page](https://www.fire-path.app/features/fire-dashboard)

![](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fmockup.png&w=3840&q=75)

![Fire Path daily tasks screen](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Fproduct%2Fen%2F07.png&w=3840&q=75)

## Who this product page is best for

These are the use cases most likely to move from understanding the product to actually downloading and using the app.

### People who want more than one static FIRE number

Fire Path uses multiple modes, scenario comparison, and planning inputs to make the path clearer.

### People who already have assets but want a stronger planning layer

Asset management and dashboard tracking connect holdings directly to the financial independence goal.

### People who compare multiple assumptions before deciding

Comparison mode and saved scenarios make the product useful for structured decision-making.

### People who need a reason to come back and keep planning

Daily tasks, streaks, and progress views make repeat use more natural than one-time downloads.

## Questions before downloading

### How is Fire Path different from a typical FIRE calculator?

It combines six FIRE modes, comparison mode, asset management, a progress dashboard, scenario history, and habit-based tracking instead of returning only one static result.

### Does it also work as an asset management app?

Yes. v1.3.0 added asset management and a multi-currency overview so holdings and FIRE planning can live in the same product.

### Is it useful if I mainly want to compare FIRE strategies?

Yes. Comparison mode and multiple FIRE paths are some of the strongest reasons to use Fire Path instead of a simpler calculator.

### Can I use it without signing in?

Yes. Core planning can be used without login. Login is mainly for cloud sync and cross-device backup.

## Turn what you just saw into a plan you can actually use

If you already know which assumptions, assets, and trade-offs you want to manage, the next step is not another article. It is opening the app and building your own version.

[Download the app](https://www.fire-path.app/download?source=toolpage_final&cta=download_app) [Read the methodology](https://www.fire-path.app/methodology)

[![Fire Path](https://www.fire-path.app/_next/image?url=%2Fstatic%2Fimages%2Flogo.png&w=64&q=75)Fire Path](https://www.fire-path.app/)

Your path to financial independence
